reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
저희집 고영희님은 종이 스크레처를 절대 쓰지 않는ㅜㅜ
층간소음매트만 박박 애용하는 냥이인데
띠로리
우도땅콩박스가 맘에 들었나봐요
조립하자말자 뛰어들어가더니 꿈에 그리던 스크래처 사용까지~~
스크래처만 구입해서 갈수있어서 넘 좋네요
욜심히 박박 긁고 리필 구입하러 올게요
reviews.content_en: Our Goryeonghee doesn't use paper scratchers at all 😭 She's a cat who only loves the soundproofing mat, but it looks like she fell in love with the Udo Peanut Box! 🐱 She jumped right in as soon as we assembled it and even started using the scratchers she's been dreaming about~~ It's so great that we can just buy the scratcher refills separately and replace them. I'll come back to buy refills after she scratches away diligently!

reviews.name: d****
reviews.content: 강쥐까지좋아하는 땅콩! 애들이 너무만족하네용 냥이당 하나씩ㅎㅎ곧 관심이시들해지겠지만 지금은 냄새맡고 뒷발팡팡이까지 난리났어용!!
reviews.content_en: Even the puppy loves the peanut! The kids are so satisfied with it 😄 One per cat haha The novelty might wear off soon, but right now they're going crazy sniffing and doing those back leg kicks!!

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content:
역시나 오자마자 바로 들어가서 나갈 생각은 안하네용ㅎㅎㅎ
넘 좋아해서 저두 기분이 좋았네요ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Just as expected, she went right in as soon as we put it down and has no intention of leaving haha 😂 She loves it so much that I'm happy too haha 😂

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 와 너무 예쁘고 친환경 제품이네요! 스크래처에 본드가 쓰이는지 몰랐는데 이번에 우도땅콩 스크래처 구입하고 알게 되었어요~~ 앞으론 본드 성분이 없는 스크래처로 구입해 울 냥이 건강 지킬래요! 우연히 바잇미를 알게되어 첫구매 했는데 할인쿠폰 덕에 기분좋은 구매였어요~ 둘러보니 좋은 제품이 많이 보여서 다음에 또 이용하려고 합니다. 우도땅콩 스크래처 완전 추천해요 :)
reviews.content_en: Wow, it's so pretty and eco-friendly! I didn't know adhesive was used in scratchers, but I found out after buying the Udo Peanut Scratcher this time~~ From now on, I'll buy scratchers without adhesive to keep my kitty healthy! I happened to discover BITE ME and made my first purchase, and thanks to the discount coupon, it was a happy purchase~ I can see there are lots of great products here, so I plan to shop again next time. I totally recommend the Udo Peanut Scratcher :)

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
엄청 좋아해요! 
위에 고리가 있어서 낚시대로 활용도 가능하고
땅콩스크레쳐랑 세트로 샀는데 너무 귀여워요💛
reviews.content_en: I love it so much! There's a loop on top so it can even be used as a fishing toy, and I bought it as a set with the peanut scratcher and it's so cute 💛

reviews.name: l****
reviews.content: 우도 땅콩 반응이 너무 좋아요ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: The cats' reaction to the Udo peanut is amazing haha

reviews.name: 채****
reviews.content: 뜯어주자마자 너덜너덜해질 정도로 스크래쳐에 환장하는 냥님들이라  하우스마냥 들어가 상주해계시는데 땅콩 아주 옛날에 뗀 주인님이 땅콩박스에 들어가 계시니 너무… 하찮고 귀여워서 볼 때마다 행복해짐..
reviews.content_en: As soon as we took it out, the cats were so crazy about the scratcher that it became tattered, so they went in like it's their house and are living in there, but the owner who got the peanut box a long time ago went into the peanut box too, and it's so... worthless and adorable that every time I see them I'm so happy..

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요. 박스 물어뜯는 걸 좋아하는 냥이라서 이것도 물어뜯었는데 박스 겉면이 코팅되어 있어서 막 찢어지진 않네요. 이빨 자국만 났어요~~ 접착제가 없는 것도 좋고 닳은 부분만 뜯어서 리필해주면 되니까 쓰레기도 적게 나오고 좋은 것 같습니다!
reviews.content_en: It's so cute. My cat likes to chew on boxes, so she chewed this too, but the outer surface of the box is coated so it doesn't just rip apart. It just has bite marks on it~~ It's great that there's no adhesive, and since you can just tear off the worn parts and replace them with refills, there's less trash and it seems like a great product!

reviews.name: 도****
reviews.content: ㅋㅋ 애기가 좋아해요. 이거 보고 지인들이 땅콩이 필요해서 들어간거냐고.. ㅜ 잔인하지만.. 좋아하니 다행이야 애기야.. 근데 조맂식이라 좀 놀랏네요 좀 남는건 나중에 쓰라고 잇는건가요??
reviews.content_en: Haha my baby loves it. People saw this and asked if the peanut goes in because she needs to hide... 😭 It's cruel but... I'm glad she likes it baby... But since it's modular assembly, I was a bit surprised. Are you supposed to save the leftover parts for later??

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
조립해서 두자마자 들어가서 나오질않네요 
어디에 두든 계속 안에 들어가있어욬ㅋㅋㅋ 대만족 
밑에 스크레쳐사이즈맞게 잘라서 넣었습니다 조립도 간편하고 귀엽네요!
reviews.content_en: As soon as I assembled it and put it down, she went in and won't come out haha I'm so satisfied! I cut the scratcher to fit the bottom size and inserted it. Assembly is simple and it's cute!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 새벽에 부스럭 소리가 나서 눈 떠보니 냥이가 박스에 몸 구겨 넣고 있더라고요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 아침에 조립해 줄 땐 관심 없는척하더니.. 그리고 박스 재질이 좋음!! 냥이가 물어도 너덜 해질 것 같진 않아서 만족해요!!
reviews.content_en: I woke up hearing rustling sounds in the middle of the night and caught my kitty squeezing herself into the box ㅋㅋㅋㅋ She played it cool when I assembled it in the morning.. And the box material is really good!! I'm satisfied because it doesn't seem like it'll fall apart even if my cat chews on it!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 그림도 귀엽고 냥이들이 바로 사용해주니 좋네요! 무접착으로 안전한 제품이라 만족합니다! *_*
reviews.content_en: The design is cute and my cats are using it right away, which is great! I'm satisfied that it's a safe product with no adhesive! *_*

reviews.name: 고****
reviews.content: 아주 잘 애용하고 있습니다
reviews.content_en: Using it very well!

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
9개월 3.5kg 중성화완료 여아 후기

포장풀기전부터 킁카킁카 냄새맡더니 인형들고 도망가네요 ㅋㅋㅋ
저희 냥이는 머리가 몸에 비해서 작은편이라 크기가 큰 인형보다는 작은 인형이나 공을 좋아하는편인데 땅콩이들이 작아서 입사이즈에도 딱 맞아요.
박스만들어주자마자 다 물어뜯어버리려는거 겨우 말리고 역시..고양이들은 박스가 좋나봐요..☆ 스크래칭도 한번해주고 들어앉아서 그루밍하네욥
reviews.content_en:
9-month-old, 3.5kg, spayed female review

She was sniffing it before I even opened the packaging, then grabbed the toys and ran away ㅋㅋㅋ My cat's head is proportionally smaller compared to her body, so she prefers smaller toys or balls rather than large ones, and the peanuts are small so they fit perfectly in her mouth. The moment I made the box, she tried to chew it all up and I barely stopped her—cats really do love boxes..☆ She did some scratching and then sat down grooming herself

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 뒷발팡팡 좋아하는 애용이가 너무 좋아해요 ㅋㅋㅋ 캣닢 냄새가 나는데다가 귀여운 땅콩 디자인이라 더 맘에듭니다🥜
reviews.content_en: My Yong-i who loves doing back kicks really loves it ㅋㅋㅋ It has a catnip scent and the cute peanut design makes me love it even more 🥜

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 아가들이 너무 좋아해요! 애들 장난감 가지고 놀면 무조건 1분컷인데 튼튼해서 아직도 살아남아있습니당 ㅎㅎ 무엇보다 너무 귀여워요ㅜㅜㅜ!!!
reviews.content_en: The babies really love it! Normally toys get destroyed in 1 minute flat when they play with them, but this one is sturdy and still surviving ㅎㅎ And it's so cute above all!! ㅜㅜㅜ!!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
땅콩 없는 고양이에게 선물하는 땅콩 인형과 땅콩박스...

3살 5kg의 고양이인데 생각보다 박스가 꽉 들어찬다는 느낌을 줍니다. 고양이들은 꽉 끼는 걸 좋아한다곤 하지만 저희 고양이는 팔다리를 쭉 뻗을 수 있는 걸 더 선호하기 때문에 오레 머물러 있진 않더라구요.

그리고 인형은 아주 좋아라 했습니다! 사진을 보면 아시겠지만 물고 뜯고 하더라구요. 입에 쉽게 물고 놀줄 알았는데 생각보다 무게감이 있어서 물고 돌아다니고 그러진 않았습니다. 아마 쟤의 치악력이 약한 걸수도 있어요..

그래도 뭐.. 나름 만족하면서 구매한 상품입니다!
reviews.content_en:
Gifting peanut toys and a peanut box to a cat who's never had peanuts...

My cat is 3 years old and 5kg, and the box felt more tightly packed than I expected. While cats are said to like tight spaces, my cat prefers being able to stretch out their legs, so she doesn't stay in it long.

But she really loved the toys! As you can see from the photos, she was chewing and biting them. I thought she'd pick them up easily and play with them, but they're heavier than expected so she doesn't carry them around and play. Maybe her bite force is just weak...

But anyway, it's a product I'm satisfied with and purchased!

reviews.name: 원****
reviews.content:
엄청 잘가지고 놀고 3개가 한세트라서 더 좋아요
장난감 금방 망가트리는 반려묘인데 3개있어서 든든합니다
reviews.content_en: She plays with it a lot and since it's a set of 3, I like it even more. My cat destroys toys quickly, so having 3 is reassuring.

reviews.name: S****
reviews.content:
영상을 리뷰로 올릴 수 있어야 해요. 
“땅콩 소중해❤️🥜
3년 동안 마따따비는 물고 빨아도 캣입 좋아하는 모습을 보지 못해서 우리 나오라는 다르구나 생각했는데 크나큰 착각이라는 것을 깨닫게 해주었습니다. 평생 땅콩도 없어본 공주님이 땅콩을 왜이리 소중히 물고 빨고 차고 핥고…새침대기라 카메라 들이대면 모르는척 하는데 길면 이틀 보통 하루면 지루해하던 인형 장난감을 일주일 넘게 가지고 놀아서 후회없는 구매왔어요. 당근도 사렵니다.
단점은 상품 택이 외부에 있어서 씹어 놀 때 안좋아보여 가위로 바로 잘랐어요. 택 없이 출시하면 단가도 줄고 더 좋을 것 같아요.
reviews.content_en:
There should be a way to upload videos as reviews.
"Peanut is precious ❤️🥜
For 3 years even with Ma-tata-bi, I never saw her interested in catnip, so I thought she was just different from other cats. But this made me realize what a huge mistake that was. This princess who's never had peanuts in her whole life is so carefully carrying, sucking, kicking, and licking the peanut... She acts like she doesn't know when I point the camera at her because she's sassy, but a toy she'd get bored with in a day or so at most—she's been playing with for over a week! It's a purchase I have no regrets about. I want to buy carrots too.
The downside is that the tag is on the outside, so it looked bad when she chewed on it, so I cut it off right away with scissors. If it were released without tags, the unit cost would go down and it would be even better.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
지금도 택배상자만 열면 그 상자는 그날 최고의 놀이터이자 안식처~ 큰 건 커서 좋고 비좁은 건 작아서 좋고 ~
아이들 어릴때 비슷한 제품들도 들여놔봤지만 일어 가득해서 집사 안구보호를 위해 꺼려졌는데 제주도 사는 고양이 스토리를 가진 한글 스크래처상자라 신규이벤트로 선택! 젊을 땐 상자스크래쳐가 헤어지고 좁은 곳에 포개어 둘이 눕고 하던 아이들이 노묘가 되서인지 눈길 살짝 주기만 할뿐 아직은 크게 사용안하고 있네요 ;;
며칠 안됐으니 필 꽂힐날만 기다려봅니다 
두번째 사진은 빡빡하게 바닥을 깔아 완성 후 남은 스크래처에요 나중에 일부 보수도 가능할듯합니다
reviews.content_en:
Even now, when the delivery box opens, it becomes the best playground and sanctuary for that day~ The big one is good because it's big and the small one is good because it's snug~
When my kids were younger I tried similar products too, but they were full of fluff which made me want to protect my eyesight, so I chose this as a new event item—a Korean scratching box with a story of a cat living in Jeju. When they were young they'd scratch the box and curl up in a tight space, but now that they're older cats, they only glance at it and aren't using it much yet ;;
It's only been a few days, so I'm just waiting for the moment they get interested.
The second photo shows the leftover scratcher after laying everything densely on the floor. Some repairs might be possible later.

reviews.name: n****
reviews.content: 기대안하고 받아서인지 상품 퀄리티 디자인 패키지까지 너무 마음에 듭니다^^ 이렇게 튼튼한 스크래쳐박스는 처음이라 너무 좋아요~~ 박스프린트도 반짝반짝 광이나네요~~~ 더 좋은건 골판지에요 풀로 접착한게 아니라 살짝접어서 넣어주는 방식 신기합니다 고양이 키우시는 분이 만든거라 그런지 여기저기 신경쓴 부분이 많네요^^ 모든 부분이 다 마음에 듭니다 ^^ 선물하기 정말 좋아요 스크래쳐박스를 담은 큰 박스 패키지가 버리기 아까울 정도로 예뻐요~~^^ 이제 박스 고민안하고 여기서 구매하면 될것같아요 ~~  감사합니다~
reviews.content_en: I didn't expect much, but I'm so happy with the product quality, design, and packaging ^^ This is the first scratching box I've seen that's this sturdy, I love it~~ The box print is so shiny and glossy~~~ What's even better is the cardboard—it's not glued together but cleverly folded in, which is amazing! Since it seems to be made by someone who owns cats, there are so many thoughtful details ^^ I love every single part ^^ It's really great for gifting. The large box package containing the scratching box is so pretty it feels a shame to throw away~~^^ I think I'll just buy from here from now on without worrying about the box ~~ Thank you~

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 아진짜 진심너무만족쓰❤️ 우선 애들장난감 미개봉상태에서도 난리나구요ㅋㅋㅋ 땅콩너무귀얍ㅋㅋㅋ스크레쳐박스 너무예뻐요 스크레쳐부분도 본드 사용하지않아 좋고 먼가 튼튼한느낌ㅋ 편한지 코골며 주무시네요 추가로더 구매하려구요 그리고함께보내주신히끄명함 두개나와서 너무행복ㅋㅋ보내주신 부스터간식이랑 미니트릿 감사히 잘먹였어요  부스터간식 추가로구매하려구요 기호성좋네유ㅋㅋ 사장님 고양이들꼬마니마니 만들어주세요ㅋㅋ너무나행복해유❤️❤️❤️사업번창하세유❤️❤️
reviews.content_en: Honestly, I'm SO satisfied ❤️ First of all, the kids go crazy over the unopened toy ㅋㅋㅋ Peanut is SO cute ㅋㅋㅋ The scratching box is so pretty. I like that the scratcher part doesn't use glue and feels really sturdy ㅋ He's so comfortable he's sleeping and snoring away ㅋ I'm planning to buy more. And I was so happy getting TWO flea combs that came with it ㅋㅋ Thank you for the booster treats and mini treats that came with it—they were gobbled right up. I'm planning to buy more booster treats ㅋㅋ He really likes them! Boss, please make more toys for the little kitties ㅋㅋ We're so happy ❤️❤️❤️ Wishing your business thrives ❤️❤️

reviews.name: d****
reviews.content: 이제는 정말 하루에 자는 시간이 너무나 길어 운동량이 걱정되는 13살 노묘를 키우는 집입니다. 옛날에 사준 쥐 인형을 아주 가끔 밤에 물고 돌아다니며 울곤하는데 제가 그 쥐 몰골에 한두번 놀란 것이 아니기에 우도땅콩으로 바꿔줘야겠다 마음 먹었어요 ㅋㅋㅋ뜯자마자 히끄 명함? 냄새 맡고 뒤집어지네요. 입에 물기 좋은 사이즈에 5분만에 침 범벅 되는 것을 보니 만족스럽습네다. 이제 밤에 화장실 가다가 쥐인형 보고놀랄일 없이 땅콩 표정보고 피식..
reviews.content_en: I have a 13-year-old senior cat at home who sleeps way too much these days and I'm worried about her exercise level. She occasionally picks up the old mouse toy I gave her at night and carries it around meowing, and I've been startled by that poor mouse's appearance more than once or twice, so I decided to swap it out for Peanut ㅋㅋㅋ As soon as I opened it, she caught a whiff of the flea comb inside and flipped out. The size is perfect for holding in her mouth, and within 5 minutes it was covered in drool, which tells me she's satisfied. Now I won't be startled going to the bathroom at night and seeing that mouse toy—instead I'll chuckle at Peanut's cute expression..

reviews.name: l****
reviews.content:
6키로 첫째 냥이는 못 들어가네요
모르고 시킨건 아니라 괜찮아요 
3키로 5키로 냥이는 여자냥이들이라 크기는 괜찮아요 첫째 냥이만 잃어버렸던 땅콩을 이번에 찾았네요
여분의 스크레쳐가 조금 있어서
그 점은 좋은거 같아요 
박스 안쪽으로 접어 넣어서 고정하는 종이 부분은
고정이 잘 안되서 조금씩 들떠 있긴한데
냥이들이 사용할때 불편하거나 그렇진 않아요
받은 날 바로 뜯뜯해서 집사은 만족 했습니다
땅콩도향이 좀 나면 더 잘가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en:
The 6kg firstborn kitty can't fit inside.
I knew what I was ordering, so it's all good.
The 3kg and 5kg kitties are female and the size works fine for them. I found the Peanut that the firstborn had lost!
It's nice that there are some extra scratchers.
The paper part that folds into the box for fixing
doesn't hold super well and lifts up a bit,
but it's not inconvenient for the kitties when they use it.
I was satisfied right away when I opened it.
The cats would play with Peanut more if it had a bit more scent.

reviews.name: S****
reviews.content:
어디 갔나 찾아보면 상자 안에 쏙 들어가 있어요. 
귀여워서 심장 뿌시는 건 덤!
신기하게도 다0소 스크래쳐만 사용해서 먼지가 많이 나도 대안으로 찾은 다른 스크래쳐들러 여태 돈 낭비하기만 해왔어요. 접이식 조립이라 처음엔 당황했는데 잘 쓰는 모습 보니 신랑도 저도 흐뭇하지만 하네요. 같이 산 땅콩 인형도 여태 구입한 인형 중에 제일 격렬하게 사랑방도 있어요. 앞으로 용품은 무조건 여기서 구매해야겠네요.
reviews.content_en:
When you can't find them, they're tucked right inside the box.
It's so cute that your heart just melts!
Interestingly, since the cats only use this scratcher, we don't get much dust, so all those other scratchers we bought before were just a waste of money. I was confused at first because it's foldable assembly, but seeing them use it so well makes both my husband and I feel so proud. The Peanut toy we bought together is also the toy they've loved the most fiercely out of all the toys we've ever gotten. From now on, I'm definitely buying all supplies from here.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
처음에는 관심없어보였는데
새벽에 한번 긁더니 잘 긁네요
안에 들어가있을때가 너무 귀여워요!!!
우도땅콩 너무너무 귀여워요ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en:
At first they didn't seem interested,
but after scratching once in the early morning, they scratch it well.
When they're inside it's SO cute!!!
Peanut is SO SO cute ㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
크기를걱정했는데
6.3kg냥이에게 따악!맞는사이즈입니다.약간작은느낌이있는데
냥이들은 꽉맞는걸 좋아하니깐 꾸깃꾸깃 들어가더라구요 ㅋㅋㅋ
냥이가 들어가면 우도땅콩이다~ 하고 놀리면서 궁디팡팡하는데
짜증은 내지만 ㅋㅋㅋ 자주들어가서 집사는 뿌듯합니다.

접이식 종이라서 처음써보는데 꽉끼게 넣었는데도
냥이가 좀 험학하게 스크레치하면 볼똑 티어나옵니다.
그래도 만족하면서 잘쓰고있네요~
reviews.content_en:
I was worried about the size,
and it's a PERFECT fit for my 6.3kg kitty. It feels a little snug,
but cats love a tight fit so they scamper right in ㅋㅋㅋ
When my cat goes inside I tease them saying "Oh, here comes Peanut!" and they prance around,
they get annoyed ㅋㅋㅋ but they go in so often the human is feeling proud.

Since it's foldable paper, I'm using it for the first time, and even though I put it in snugly,
when my cat scratches a bit roughly, small tears appear.
But we're still satisfied and using it well~

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 버잇미 땅콩인형이 저희 멍뭉이 최애인형이에여 ㅎㅎ 땅콩호두셋트로만 팔아서 항상 아쉬웠었는데 비록 야옹이 인형(?)이지만 땅콩만 판매한다고 하길래 바로 주문했어여 ㅎㅎ 역시 보자마자 인증샷남기고있는데 훔쳐가네요 ㅎㅎㅎ 캣닢 혹시 강아지한테도 효과있나 싶을정도로 얘가 넘 좋아해여 ㅋㅋ세개나 들어있어 하나는 아랫집 야옹이한테 나눔했어여!! 야옹이도 킁킁거리고 인형을 안고구루면서 좋아하네여 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My furry friend's favorite toy is the BITE ME Peanut figure ㅎㅎ It was always a shame that they only sold the Peanut Walnut set, but when I heard they started selling just Peanut (even though it's technically a cat toy lol), I ordered right away ㅎㅎ Sure enough, they took a photo with it as soon as they saw it, and now they're stealing it away ㅎㅎㅎ I wouldn't be surprised if catnip has an effect on dogs too because they love this thing so much ㅋㅋ There are three included so I gave one to the neighbor's cat!! The kitty is sniffing it and cuddling with the toy while rolling around, and they love it too ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 애들이 엄청 신나해요,,,ㅎㅎㅋㅋㅋㅋ 1분컷 당할까봐 조마조마 했지만 아직까지 살아남아있습니다 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 아직도 좋아해요~! 리필도 넣을수 있어서 넘 좋아요!!
reviews.content_en: The kids are having a blast,,,ㅎㅎㅋㅋㅋㅋ I was worried it'd be destroyed in 1 minute, but it's still alive ㅋㅋㅋㅋ They still love it~! And it's great that I can refill it!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 인형 좋아하는 고양이라서 반응이 아주 좋아요! 장난감 크기에 비해 라벨이 너무 크지만, 할인할 때 구매해서 가격도 디자인도 만족스러워요. (구매가 5,450원)
reviews.content_en: My cat really loves toys so the reaction is excellent! The label is a bit too big compared to the toy size, but I bought it on sale so I'm happy with both the price and design. (Purchase price: 5,450 won)

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
저희집 냥이가 바로 들어가네요
너무 좋아해요
브리티시 5키로 냥인데 꽉 맞아요
조금만 더 크면 좋을꺼같아요
박스가 너무 예뻐서 좋으네요
reviews.content_en:
My cat goes right into it 🐱
Loves it so much
It's a 5kg British Shorthair and it fits perfectly
Would be nice if it were a bit bigger
Love that the box is so pretty

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
원래 하나 사용하고 있었는데 
두마리라 한개 더 구매했어요
reviews.content_en:
I was already using one,
and since I have two cats, I bought another one

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
정말...기여워요...
땅콩 없는 애들이 땅콩 박스 들어가 있는 거 왤케 귀여운지... 
사세요..
근데 왜 항상 고양이는 포장 박스를 더 좋아하는 걸까요^^? 
기껏 조립했더니 포장 박스에 냅다 앉아보림ㅠ
7.7kg 고양이한테는 좀 작은데 6.9kg 고양이한테는 잘 맞아서 잘 들어가 있어요
저희 집 7.7키로 고영이 워낙 골격이 큰 편이긴 한데
그래도 잘 들어가서 긁긁하고 나와요
reviews.content_en:
Honestly... it's so cute... 😭
Why is it so adorable when cats without peanuts get into the peanut-shaped box...
Just buy it..
But why do cats always prefer the packaging box over the assembled product?? 😆
I put so much effort into assembling it and the cat just plops down on the original box instead 😭
It's a bit small for my 7.7kg cat, but it fits perfectly for my 6.9kg cat who uses it well
My 7.7kg kitty has a pretty large frame,
but even so, she gets in there and scratches away

reviews.name: 노****
reviews.content:
마따따비나 캣잎 가루 없어도 잘 들어가있어요! 
5키로 아이는 딱 크기가 맞는데 8키로 아이가 들어가기에는 작아요 !
reviews.content_en:
Works great even without catnip or silvervine powder!
5kg kitty fits just right, but it's too small for the 8kg one!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 사고 나서 한 번도 안 써주다가 갑자기 조용하길래 봤더니 저기서 잘 준비를 하고 있었어요 너무 ㄱㅇㅇ... 숨 멎기 직전이였어요 .... 당근이랑 땅콩 둘 중에 뭐 살까 고민 많았는데 역시 땅콩이 조금 더 귀여운 것 같아요 여러분 이거 두 번 사세요 ....
reviews.content_en: Didn't use it at all after buying, then suddenly it got quiet, so I checked and found her peacefully sleeping in there... I almost stopped breathing... 😭 I was torn between the carrot and peanut designs, but peanut is definitely cuter! Everyone, buy this twice....

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
스크래쳐는 종이보다 카펫 재질을 좋아하는데 귀여워서 사봤어요. 적응하라고 조립하자마자 캣닙 뿌려줬는데 다행히 바로 들어가서 갉갉 하네요.
근데 긁는 부분 여분으로 남는거는 댓글보고 알았어요. 설명서 첨부나 바깥 포장상자에 설명 프린트해서 쉽게 확인할 수 있음 좋을 것 같아요-
reviews.content_en:
My cat prefers carpet texture over paper for scratchers, so I bought this because it's adorable. I sprinkled some catnip right after assembly to help her adjust, and thankfully she went right in and started scratching.
But I only found out about the extra scratcher refill from the comments. It would be great if there was an instruction manual or printed information on the outer box so it's easy to see!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
평소 눈여겨 보던 제품인데 신규 이벤트로 득템하였어요!
일단 조립이 쉽고 종이 질도 좋아서 전체적으로 탄탄한 느낌이고 접착제 없이 조립만으로 완성이 되어서 안심할수 있었어요!
그리고 스크레쳐 바닥부분이 여유분으로 더 와서 나중에 닳은 부분만 바꿔주면 되니 넘 경제적이더라구요~~
무엇보다 애기가 쏙 들어가 있으면 안정적이고 넘 귀엽답니다!
reviews.content_en:
I'd been eyeing this product for a while and got it as a new event item!
First, assembly is easy and the paper quality is good, so it feels sturdy overall. Plus it assembles without any adhesive, which was reassuring!
And the scratcher comes with extra bottom pieces, so later I can just replace the worn parts - super economical~~
Best of all, when the baby curls up inside, it looks so stable and incredibly cute!

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
7주차 아깽이에오☆
모래 주문하면서 100원 득템했어요
스크래처 처음 접하는거라 아직 사용할줄 모르지만
아지트인냥 잘 들어가있어요
영상은 강아지 사냥한다고 요새에서 혼자 진지한 모습이예요
귀엽네요☆
reviews.content_en:
7-week-old kitten here ☆
Got it for 100 won when ordering litter
First time with a scratcher so she doesn't know how to use it yet,
but she goes in like it's her hideout
In the video she's doing her serious hunting pose in the fortress alone
So cute ☆

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
이 제품 강력 추천드려요!!!
세개 들어있어서 던져주기 좋습니다
사냥놀이도 좋지만 가끔 팔이 아플때 던져주면
물고오기 좋은 사이즈인거같아요!!
인형 표정이 다 다르고 탄탄한 면이라 
오래 사용가능할거같아요
무엇보다 엄청 귀엽,,,,, 스크래쳐도 구매하고싶어요
reviews.content_en:
Highly recommend this product!!!
Comes with three so great for tossing around
Hunting play is fun, but when my arm hurts sometimes, I throw it and it's a perfect size for fetch!!
Each toy has a different expression and the material is sturdy so
it should last a long time
And above all, so adorable,,,, I want to buy the scratcher too

reviews.name: A****
reviews.content:
히끄 인스타그램에 종종 보이는 저 땅콩인형이 귀여워 눈에 담고 맘에 담아뒀었는데 
나만 없던 고양이가 저에게도 생겨 ㅋㅋㅋ 
우디에게 선물로 사주었어요 
땅콩 삼형제가 너무 깜찍해요 ㅎㅎ 
생각보다 탄탄한 느낌이네요?
사이즈도 냥이가 갖고 놀기에 딱 좋아요 
바닥에 두고 몰고다니는데 
좋아하는 것 같아 기분이 좋습니당 ㅎ
reviews.content_en:
I kept seeing those cute peanut toys on Instagram and fell in love 🥜
I didn't have a cat back then, but now I do lol
I got it as a gift for Woody 🐱
The peanut trio is so adorable 😄
Feels sturdier than expected?
The size is perfect for the kitty to play with
She pushes it around the floor
and seems to love it so I'm happy 😊

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
7.3kg인 코숏 여아에게 사줬는데 좋아합니다.
조립도 아주 쉬워요.
안에 긁는것도 좋아하고 들어가서 머리 기대고 앉아있는걸 좋아해요... 다양한 디자인이 나왔으면 좋겠습니다.
안에 넣는 스크래처 리필도 구매할 수 있으면 좋겠습니다~!!
reviews.content_en: Got this for my 7.3kg female Scottish Fold and she loves it! Assembly is super easy too. She loves scratching on the inside and also loves going in to rest her head and sit... I wish there were more design options. It would be great if I could buy refills for the scratcher inside~!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 조립하기가 좀 힘들었어여 ㅠㅠ 스크래쳐가 포장지인 줄 알았음 버릴뻔 !!!!!!!!!! 그치만 애들 너무 잘 쓰고 박스 그림도 너무 귀여워서 ㅠㅠ 대왕만족이요 애들이 박스 다 물어뜯어서 헤지면.... 또 사고 아니라면 스크래쳐 리필만 더 살게여 스크래쳐 넉넉히 있어서 헤지먄 교체 할 수 있어서 좋은 것 같아용
reviews.content_en: Assembly was a bit tough ㅠㅠ I almost threw away the scratcher thinking it was just packaging!!!!!!!!!! But the cats use it SO well and the box design is so cute ㅠㅠ I'm mega satisfied! If the cats chew up the whole box and it falls apart... I'll buy it again, or if not, I'll just get scratcher refills. It's great that there are plenty of scratchers so you can replace them when they wear out 😊

reviews.name: 우****
reviews.content: 우도땅콩박스랑 세트라 귀여워서 사고싶었는데 잘 놀아주고 좋아하니까 더 좋네여 ㅎㅎ 사이즈가 딱이에요
reviews.content_en: I wanted to buy it because it came as a set with the Udo Peanut Box and it's so cute, but since my cat plays with it so well and loves it, I'm even happier now hehe The size is perfect!

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 받자마자 조립해줬는데 자기껀줄 바로 아네요ㅎㅎ바로 들어가서 긁고 좋아해요ㅎㅎ제품 외관도 귀엽고 조립도 쉬워서 사용하기 편해요~다만 안에 긁으니 종이 부스러기가 좀 많이 생기네요ㅠㅠ그게 조금 아쉽지만 그래도 좋은 제품 득템한 것 같아 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I assembled it right when it arrived and she knew right away it was hers hehe She went straight in to scratch and loves it hehe The product looks cute too and assembly is easy so it's convenient to use~ The only thing is there's quite a bit of paper debris from scratching inside ㅠㅠ That's a bit disappointing, but overall I'm really happy with this great purchase!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 택배 올 때마다 박스안에 들어가서 안나오길래 귀엽고 튼튼한 박스하나 장만해줬어요 안에 스크래쳐 깔자마자 들어가서 발톱갈더라구요 (집사뿌듯..)잘때도 여기서 자고 공간도 넉넉한지 장난감넣어주니 한참 놀아요 참고로 3키로정도의 고영희입니다
reviews.content_en: Every time a package arrives, my cat goes into the box and doesn't come out, so I got her a cute and sturdy box of her own lol As soon as I put the scratcher inside, she went in and started sharpening her claws (cat parent is proud..) She also sleeps here and since the space is roomy, I put some toys in and she plays for ages. FYI this is Go Young-hee, about 3kg 😸

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content:
ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 은신처가 2개나 생겼네요 ㅋ 겉에 흰박도 좋아허고 우도땅콩 박스도 좋아하네요 착착착착 접기 쉬워 5분이면 뚝딱 만들수 있어요 
캣잎가루 좀 뿌려주니 아주 신났어요
좋은 상품. 빠른 배송 감사합니다 바잇미♡
reviews.content_en: Hahahaha Now we have 2 hiding spots! 😂 She loves the white box on the outside and also loves the Udo Peanut Box. It's so easy to fold - takes just 5 minutes to put together! I sprinkled some catnip powder and she got super excited! Great product. Thank you for the fast shipping BITE ME♡

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 스크레처 부분 조립하느라 힘들었어요. 힘으로 이게 되나 싶고 ,, 애들이 좋아해줘서 집사는 뿌듯합니다
reviews.content_en: Assembly for the scratcher part was tough. I wasn't sure if it would work with just force,, but the cats love it so the cat parent is proud!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 박스와 스크레처는 냥이에겐 필수품이죠! 박스가 너무 귀엽네요. 들어가 있으면 너무 귀여워요!!!
reviews.content_en: Boxes and scratchers are must-haves for cats! The box is so cute. When she's inside it, it's absolutely adorable!!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 후원물품으로 보냈습니다. 너무 귀여워요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: Sent this as a donation item. It's so cute hahahaha

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
우리 공주님 이름이 한라봉인데 보자마자 너무 잘어울리고 귀여워서 구매했습니다!
라봉공주님 제주에서 온 우도땅콩과 박스 너무 너무 좋아하십니다 '◡'
앞으로도 공주님을 더욱더 잘 모시는 집사가 되겠습니다 ^^*
reviews.content_en: My princess's name is Hanllabong and when I saw this, it was such a perfect match and so cute that I bought it! Princess Rabong absolutely loves the Udo Peanut Box and box that came from Jeju '◡' From now on, I'll be an even better cat parent to my princess ^^*
